criteriaResults.evidence: SKILL.md YAML name:bober-incident; Iron Law verbatim @26 'NO INCIDENT WITHOUT TIMELINE; NO RESOLUTION WITHOUT VERIFICATION'; 7 Red Flags; 6 Rationalization rows; ASCII state machine @158-192; Slash flow @112-153; cross-refs to bober.diagnose/.deploy/.runbook/.postmortem.
src/cli/commands/incident.ts: 5 subcommands (start/status/end/list/abort). end requires --verified|--override. abort --reason requiredOption. Registered in cli/index.ts:30,266.

STATUS_TRANSITIONS @types.ts:136-142. transitionPhase @165-199 validates BEFORE setIncidentStatus, throws InvalidTransitionError. applyDiagnosisOutcome routes risky→'remediating' @221. applyDeploymentOutcome routes success+verified→'monitoring' @278-280. resolved→investigating requires reopenReason @182-185.

Integration test 'checkpoint gate fires for EVERY risky action' @448: 3 risky → 3 'auto-approved risky action' warnings (expect(.length).toBe(3) @498). DiskCheckpointMechanism re-registered to tmpdir. Per-action loop, no batching.

renderStatus @59-198: phase/severity/duration/latest diagnosis from diagnoses (@72-103)/action counts from changelog (@107-132)/resolution criteria + evidence (@136-175)/abort path (@178-184)/next-hint (@188-197). ENOENT-tolerant for missing artifacts.
SKILL.md Slash Command Flow @112-153: prompt for symptom if missing, refuses vague symptom, runs 'bober incident start', announces phase transitions with incidentId. Markdown formatting documented.

abort() @orchestrator.ts: writes aborted.txt @330-337 + abort-report.md @377-392 → 'aborted' transition @397. Rollback ONLY when opts.confirmRollback===true @351. Test verifies callCount()==0 without confirm; ==2 with confirm.

tests/integration/incident-lifecycle.test.ts: NO vi.mock — REAL timeline/rollback/resolution-verify/postmortem/orchestrator. Only ExecutorSeam + MetricQueryClient are in-memory test seams. 10 tests: full lifecycle (30s timeout), 2 invalid transitions, valid reopen, abort with/without rollback, double-abort error, status across phases, 3-gate test. All pass in 490ms. Postmortem.md verified on disk. Timeline chronological ordering verified.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 1040 tests, +10 from 1030 baseline. No regressions.

summary: All 9 criteria pass on iter 1. Tier 3 INTEGRATION CAPSTONE complete. State machine guarded transitions; abort footgun-prevention enforced; integration test is genuinely integration (no module mocking, real orchestrator+timeline+rollback+postmortem code exercised); per-action gate fires for all 3 risky actions; test count 1030→1040.
